feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Tax Classification Not Maintained per Sales Area in Customer Master (F0850A)
entry.content:
Tax classification automatically transferred to all sales areas


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order Print Output Log S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We have requirement to export PDF string for sales order confirmation. As standard sales order API doesn't provide PDF xstring we are thing of using API API_CLOUD_PRINT_PULL_SRV to pull directly from print queues but challenge here is we are unable to fetch relation between technical ID displayed here in message log and sales order number.

Does anyone know other API which can provide this data to establish link between printer API and sales order number.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud PR Workflow
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a PR workflow configuration that excludes the PR requestor from the approval process. However, an error occurs if the PRrequestor is also one of the required approvers. In this case, how can I reassign the PR to another user for approval when the PR encounters an error?

entry.title: Required Automation Of Delivery & PGI Creation and Billing Documents In AIL Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

  1. QR Code scanning
    The sales person scans the QR codes of all trolleys and enters the Sales Order Number and Vehicle Number in the system during the scanning process.
  2. Submission
    After completing the scanning of all trolleys, the sales person clicks the “Submit” button.
  3. Reference Number Generation
    Once the Submit button is clicked, the system generates a Reference Number.
    Under this reference number, the following documents are automatically generated:
  • Invoice
  • E-Invoice
  • E-Way Bill
  • Digital Signature
  1. Bill Download
    The sales person opens the application on the computer and enters the Reference Number and Vehicle Number.
    The Download button will appear. After clicking it, all bills related to that vehicle will be downloaded.
  2. Trip Sheet Generation
    After entering the Reference Number in the Trip Sheet, all invoices related to that reference will appear in the table.
    Finally, click the Save button to generate the Trip Sheet.
  3. Is the Automatic Delivery and PGI creation in SAP Public Cloud?

Regards,

Ashish

9049672320

entry.title: Group Journal Entries report with complete user name
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

We're using Group Reporting Public Cloud version. I'm exploring standard applications to get a list of Group Journal entries including user name. So far all the applications I've explored only bring CB user but not complete user name. Is there any existing application that brings that information?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Restricting Quality Inspection Lot number range buffering in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
After doing some search on restricting number range buffering as we use to do in on-premises and private cloud through SNRO, still not able to find any alternative app specific to public cloud for stopping buffering for

QM area:
- QLOSE (inspection lots in QM)
- QMEL_NR (notification number range)

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Billing Condition Type to GL Account CDS view for creating custom sales register in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create a custom report for Sales register. Which contains the billing document item details along with the condition type and the GL used to post the condition amount.

I am planning to develop this in the Eclipse.

I have tried to achieve the field by joining multiple CDS view as below. But unable to get the expected result.

I_BillingDocumentItem
I_BillingDocumentItemPrcgElmnt
I_SalesDocument
I_OperationalAcctgDocItem

If anyone from the community please help me to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: WE GET ERROR FOR BUSINESS PARTNER IN E DOCUMENT COCKPIT
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

we are sucessful to implement the ksef in Q system, when we tested in P-system in edocument cockpit we got these errors as bp is missing can someone help us in regards.

entry.title: Showing Custom fields in QM Notification Item Overview table (QM01) in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: Need to know how to add Custom Input fields in 'QM Notification Items Overview' table screen without going into item details

entry.title: Create Reservations for Self Service Procurement for Cost Center and Project
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

We are using app "My Purchase Requisitons" (F1639A) and want to create reservations for requisitions with materials on stock with account assignment cost center and project. 

We are able to create either reserviations for projects (movment 221) or cost center (movement 201) by doing all settings in F2278 Settings for Creation of Reservation. 

However somehow it seems that it is not possible to do both settings in the app at the same time so that I can create reservations for projects (with 221) and for cost center (with 201) movment type. 

Please let us know how those settings can be done to achieve both behaviours. 

Thank you.
Best regards. 
Andreas Schwaiger

entry.title: Please Suggest an API or BOI to create and update Purchase Order Confirmation
entry.content:
We are searching an API/ BOI to upload purchase order confirmation with fields in confirmation tab in purchase order including PO and PO item

Also function to mass upload.

entry.title: Where can I check withholding tax history?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Based on the Tax Exemption Certificate, we update the withholding tax information for suppliers according to the due date. Where can I view both the old and new WHT details in one location?

Thanks & Regards,

DNR

entry.title: Sale Customize Report
entry.content: We are creating customized sales report where we need to have invoice details plus the payment details but we are not able to find any cds which can create a link between payment and invoice.

entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know more about bank statement process.

entry.title: Migration Objects listed in Help Portal but not available in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm working on a migration project for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition .

I found 9 migration objects that are documented in the official Help Portal
but do NOT appear in the actual system when I search via transaction F8638
(Migration Object Search).

These objects are:
1. Business partner (Direct Transfer)
2. MM - Purchasing info record (Direct Transfer)
3. Object classification (general template) (Direct Transfer)
4. PP - Material BOM (Direct Transfer)
5. PP - Production order (Direct Transfer)
6. PP - Production version (Direct Transfer)
7. PP - Routing (Direct Transfer)
8. PP - Work center (Direct Transfer)
9. Pricing condition (sales) (Direct Transfer)

All 9 objects are:
- Listed in Help Portal with "Migration Approach: Direct Transfer"
- Have valid Business Catalogs assigned
- Marked as "Supported" in the documentation
- But NOT visible in F8638 in our Public Edition system

For comparison, similar objects exist in the system as Staging Table versions:
- "Material BOM" (Staging Table) exists
- "Production version" (Staging Table) exists
- "Routing" (Staging Table) exists
- etc.

Questions:
1. Why are these Direct Transfer versions documented but not available?
2. Is Direct Transfer approach deprecated for Public Edition?
3. Should we ignore these 9 objects and use only the Staging Table versions?
4. Is this expected behavior or a configuration issue?

Reference:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/20607b6de19a4d34a41b0abec6186b01.html

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: #CoE#QDGG App for external auditor
entry.content: Hi Expert, Is there any app can be used for external auditor to offer a detailed view of security audit log events? B,R

entry.title: VAT ID x country mismatch: impact on tax determination, billing output and reporting
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we are currently facing a question regarding VAT handling in Public Cloud and would appreciate your input.

In our current setup, the system checks whether the VAT ID of a customer matches the country of the business partner.
If there is a mismatch (e.g. customer based in Ireland but VAT ID from Austria), the system treats the VAT ID as invalid.

As a consequence:

  • a different tax determination is applied 
  • the customer is processed as if no valid VAT ID exists
  • the VAT ID is not printed on the billing document, even though it is maintained in the master data

From a system logic perspective, this behavior is understandable.

However, according to our customer, the business expectation is different:
The customer should still be treated as having a valid VAT ID (as one is actually maintained), regardless of the country mismatch.

This would imply:

  • a different tax determination 
  • and that the VAT ID should be printed on the billing document

Our key questions:

  • Is there a recommended way to handle such scenarios in standard?
  • How does this situation impact VAT reporting (e.g. EC Sales List or similar declarations)?
  • Does anyone know how this affects tax reporting / payment declarations in practice?

We want to ensure that both document output and legal reporting are consistent and compliant.

Any insights or experiences would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
Katharina

entry.title: In SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud Can We Create ODN Number Range Based On Sold To Party
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition can we create ODN number range based on Sold To Party (Customer)

Generally we are using business place but customer want ODN number range based on Sold to Party for few customer required specific ODN number range should hit.

Kindly provide the suggestion on the addressed issue.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Supplier rebate / allowance scenario in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to understand the best-practice way to handle a supplier rebate / allowance scenario in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Our case is not only supplier-based, but also product-structure based. For example, a product may belong to a hierarchy like: Machines → Electronics → Hovers → Phonex. An agreement may apply at different levels, such as a specific product, a subgroup like Hovers, or a higher group like Electronics.

Also, we may buy the same product from different suppliers, and each supplier may have different conditions for that same product or hierarchy level. For example:

  • Supplier A gives 10% rebate for Hovers if purchase quantity or value reaches a certain level
  • Supplier B has a different rule for the same Hovers
  • A supplier may also give a fixed monthly amount for display/shelf space
  • Some suppliers or products may have no special agreement

From what I understand, the standard area in SAP for this is Settlement Management using supplier condition contracts, including settlement of supplier rebates and fixed-amount agreements.

My questions are:

  1. Is this the correct standard approach in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  2. Can the agreement logic be maintained by supplier + product / product group / hierarchy level?
  3. For fixed monthly amounts like display support, is it usually handled as part of the same supplier settlement logic, or as a separate process?
  4. If part of the agreement depends on our sales to customers instead of only purchasing-related data, is that supported in standard Public Cloud?

My goal is to make sure we can clearly track:

  • what we pay each supplier
  • what we should receive back as rebate/credit
  • and how this is settled in SAP

I would appreciate guidance from anyone who implemented a similar scenario in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Deactivation of Company Code
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

we would like to deactivate a company code in Q and P-system.

we are not sure when we deactivate the company code. the data in the system will be available until how many years and can data be accessible for users if they have access due to audit purpose.

Can provide any links for this process in the SAP.

Do we have achieving approach in sap public cloud and whether this archiving happens in same system...?
